items.description: co-sign. a very handy mental framework for what kinds of learning transformers do well today, and why it runs into limitations. when @ankit2119 and i wrote about the need for adversarial world models earlier this year, we were describing a…

items.title: Here’s a key line in this mythos update.
items.title_zh: 这是这个神话更新中的一条关键线。
items.description: Here’s a key line in this mythos update. This is precisely an example of why engineers don’t go away, ever. We’ve made it far easier to create and find security issues, which means the new bottleneck is our ability to actually review, resp…
items.description_zh: 这是这个神话更新中的一条关键线。这正是工程师永远不会消失的一个例子。我们使创建和发现安全问题变得更加容易，这意味着新的瓶颈是我们实际审查、响应的能力……

items.title: Geoffrey Moore says startups die in the chasm because pragmatist buyers demand a "whole p…
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·摩尔 (Geoffrey Moore) 表示，初创企业死于深渊，因为实用主义买家要求“整体...
items.description: Geoffrey Moore says startups die in the chasm because pragmatist buyers demand a "whole product." These folks won't tolerate gaps. They need references. They need the complete solution. The chasm is lethal because because the buyers won't…
items.description_zh: 杰弗里·摩尔表示，初创企业死于深渊，因为实用主义买家需要“完整的产品”。这些人不会容忍差距。他们需要参考资料。他们需要完整的解决方案。这个鸿沟是致命的，因为买家不会……
